# SDE Journey

> A Technical blog on my experiences in the tech industry — by Murugappan M.

## Posts

- [Modern distributed rate limiting in the cloud](https://murugu-21.github.io/cloud-agnostic-rate-limiting/): Why LLM agents make per-user rate limiting essential, and a two-tier IP and per-user pattern that protects your compute budget while staying portable across clouds
- [Rate limit api requests in nodejs](https://murugu-21.github.io/429-googleapis/): How to query external apis without hitting 429 rate limit in nodejs
- [The developer toolbox](https://murugu-21.github.io/toolbox/): A guide to becoming a developer from my experience becoming one.
- [React Hooks](https://murugu-21.github.io/react/): My mental models about Different React Hooks and Redux pattern.
- [0.1+0.2 not equal to 0.3???😕](https://murugu-21.github.io/first-post/): The limitations of floating point math and weighing tradeoffs.
- [why i chose gatsby for my blog?](https://murugu-21.github.io/gastby/): TL;DR Static Site Generator using graphQl React stack.
- [Coin Change Problem](https://murugu-21.github.io/coin-change-problem/): Find minimum number of coins that make a given value.
